revision.comment: create wrapper template for [[Module:Template test case]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template test case|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Nowiki_template_demo]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template test case|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-11 01:45:55 on [[Template:Nowiki template demo]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template test case|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template test case|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template test case|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template test case|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template test case|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Template test case|main}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

</noinclude>
